query:
-- Check if it's a referral code
SELECT 
  r.full_name,
  r.email,
  r.team,
  r.access_type,
  r.payment_status,
  r.referral_code,
  r.group_code AS joined_group
FROM sports_day_registrations r
WHERE UPPER(r.referral_code) = 'SD002UDX'

UNION ALL

-- Check if it's a group code
SELECT 
  r.full_name,
  r.email,
  r.team,
  r.access_type,
  r.payment_status,
  r.referral_code,
  r.group_code AS joined_group
FROM sports_day_registrations r
WHERE UPPER(r.group_code) = 'SD002UDX'

UNION ALL

-- Check if it's a group code in the group_codes table
SELECT 
  gc.creatorName AS full_name,
  '' AS email,
  '' AS team,
  '' AS access_type,
  '' AS payment_status,
  '' AS referral_code,
  gc.code AS joined_group
FROM group_codes gc
WHERE UPPER(gc.code) = 'SD002UDX';
